rules_fired.name: No Units Approved Sem 1
rules_fired.message: Enrolled in 7 units but approved 0 in semester 1

reasoning_chain: [CRITICAL] No Units Approved Sem 1: Enrolled in 7 units but approved 0 in semester 1
[HIGH] Low Approval Rate Sem 2: Only 1/7 units approved in sem 2 (14%)
[HIGH] Tuition Not Paid: Tuition fees are overdue
[MEDIUM] Debtor: Student flagged as a debtor
[CRITICAL] Financial + Academic Crisis: Tuition overdue AND failing academically
[MEDIUM] Mature Student Struggling: Mature student (age 37) showing academic risk

agent3.summary: This student is facing a critical combination of academic and financial challenges, including overdue tuition and failing grades, making them a high-risk student for academic and financial stability.

interventions.action: Contact the student to discuss the overdue tuition and potential payment plan options.
Provide the student with academic support resources and connect them with tutoring services.
Offer a review of the student's academic plan and discuss potential course adjustments to improve their academic standing.

agent3.message_to_student: We understand you're facing a challenging time, and we want to help you get back on track. Let's work together to address your academic and financial concerns and ensure your success.
